paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions, as of July 22, 2026.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, scheduled for August 13, 2026, as reported by TradingView and FinanzNachrichten.de. Other news headlines discuss the company's stock price and recent developments, such as the resignation of director Miles Everson and the completion of a $375 million convertibles deal.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
